params.name: Micro Snail Garden
params.description: A delicate model that offers a panoramic view of the entire Snail Garden. Whether it's the futuristic time machine, the weathered snail houses, or even the tadpole pond, everything is vividly replicated. If observed carefully, you'll notice the tadpoles swimming in the pond!
